curation_notes: The patch commit (deec358) is a large version upgrade to JHipster 6.3.0 that changed 52 files (33+ non-test source files), making this a noisy patch. The security-relevant change is isolated to RandomUtil.kt.ejs, where all five random-value-generating functions (generatePassword, generateActivationKey, generateResetKey, generateSeriesData, generateTokenData) were switched from using RandomStringUtils.randomAlphanumeric/randomNumeric (backed by a non-cryptographic PRNG) to a shared SecureRandom-backed helper. Locations derived from the patch diff since the advisory description also pointed to the same file. No sibling files with the same vulnerability pattern were found — RandomUtil.kt.ejs is the sole random value generation utility in the project.
